column.name: description
column.value: Premium wireless headphones with noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design.

column.name: description
column.value: Soft, breathable organic cotton t-shirt available in multiple colors. Sustainable and comfortable.

column.name: description
column.value: Double-wall vacuum insulated water bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours.

column.name: description
column.value: Lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper.

column.name: description
column.value: Genuine leather bifold wallet with RFID blocking technology. Slim profile with multiple card slots.

column.name: description
column.value: Feature-rich smartwatch with heart rate monitor, GPS, and 7-day battery life.

column.name: description
column.value: Non-slip premium yoga mat with alignment lines. Extra thick for comfort.

column.name: description
column.value: Programmable 12-cup drip coffee maker with thermal carafe and auto-shutoff.
